Elantra > Body and Frame > Quarter Panel > Service and Repair > Removal and Replacement

QUARTER PANEL REMOVAL AND REPLACEMENT
Hyundai Elantra 2023

Vehicle: 2023 Hyundai Elantra
Operation: Rear Quarter Panel Replacement

REMOVAL PROCEDURE
Step 1. Disconnect battery negative terminal per Hyundai service procedure.
Step 2. Remove rear interior trim panels and access covers.
Step 3. Disconnect harness connectors and electrical components.
Step 4. Drill spot welds per Hyundai weld diagram specifications.
Step 5. Remove damaged quarter panel outer skin.

INSTALLATION PROCEDURE
Step 1. Prepare replacement panel with anti-corrosion primer.
Step 2. Apply seam sealer to all mating flanges per Hyundai specification.
Step 3. Install quarter panel using MIG welding procedure at approved weld points.
Step 4. Apply corrosion protection per Hyundai body sealant requirements.
Step 5. Verify panel gap specification per body alignment procedure.
Step 6. Reinstall all interior trim and electrical connectors.

Torque all fasteners to Hyundai specification.
Hyundai requires qualified technician review of all collision repairs.
